nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸕鶿科
nodes.summary: 鸕鶿科（Phalacrocoracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Crowned cormorant、Reed cormorant、Little pied cormorant等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鲣鸟目
nodes.summary: 鲣鸟目（Suliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如白斑军舰鸟、麗色軍艦鳥、白腹军舰鸟等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cape cormorant
nodes.summary: Cape cormorant（Cape cormorant，学名 Phalacrocorax capensis），分类上属于鲣鸟目，并归入鸕鶿科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括食物资源下降。

nodes.name: 食物资源下降
nodes.summary: 底栖生物和小型鱼类下降带来的觅食压力。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main conservation efforts underway for Cape cormorants are the protection of breeding colonies, mainly on specific islands under the jurisdiction of South African National Parks. However, one of the major challenges Cape cormorants face is food availability, with prey populations collapsing in areas of the Benguela Upwelling System. Certain studies recommend a comprehensive assessment of cormorant populations and how prey populations affect their numbers. The Namibian Ministry of Fisheries and Marine Resources has already committed to considering all elements of the ecosystem when managing fish populations. This includes predators such as the Cape cormorant, and the species’ survival will be an important reason to create quota limitations on industrial fishing, among other measures

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Cape cormorant 属于目 鲣鸟目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Cape cormorant 属于科 鸕鶿科。
